- [[Tome V — The Crafting]] — The open tome. Seventeen acts at v1.6.0: the First Cloak through the Chart Shop.

- [[Vertex Naming Audit v1]] — Provenance ledger for the 64-vertex lattice. Every named vertex carries an attri

- [[What AgentPrivacy Is]] — Mission, thesis, and orientation document. Privacy solves the delegation paradox
- [[Whitepaper v4.7]] — The Swordsman and Mage Architecture for the AI Agent Economy. Core technical arc
